enGB: My Feat
This is my feat, not your feat.
Focused Infusion(Free)
zhCN: 聚能灌注（自由）

enGB: On Cooldown
zhCN: 冷却中……

enGB: When the cruoromancer uses this infusion, he adds +1 to the DC of the infused necromancy spell. This ability can be used only once per round. At 5th level, the bonus increases to +2. At 8th level, this infusion becomes a free action.
zhCN: 融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，被灌注的死灵法术难度等级+1。此能力每回合只能使用一次。5级时，加值提升至+2；8级时，此灌注改为一个自由动作。

enGB: Sickening Infusion(Free)
zhCN: 恶心灌注（自由）

enGB: On Cooldown
zhCN: 冷却中……

enGB: When the cruoromancer uses this infusion, a creature that takes damage from the infused necromancy spell becomes sickened for (1 + half your wizard level) rounds. You can use this ability only once per turn. At 8th level, this infusion becomes a free action.
zhCN: 融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，受到被灌注的死灵法术伤害的生物陷入恶心状态，持续1 + 你的法师等级的一半的轮数。此能力每回合只能使用一次。8级时，此灌注改为一个自由动作。

enGB: Blood Infusion (Free)
zhCN: 融血灌注（自由）

enGB: Wizard Bonus Feat (Augment Summoning)
zhCN: 法师额外专长（增强召唤）

enGB: At 6th level, the cruoromancer gains a wizard bonus feat, which must be Augment Summoning.
zhCN: 融血师6级时获得一个法师额外专长，固定为增强召唤。

enGB: When using this infusion with animate dead, the summoned undead and your undead companions gain a +4 inherent bonus to Strength and Charisma for 1 minute per caster level. At 15th level, summoned undead and your undead companions affected in this way also gain temporary hit points equal to three times your wizard level.
zhCN: 通过在施放操纵亡者时以此形式灌注血液之力，你召唤出的死灵生物以及不死生物伙伴将在力量和魅力属性上获得+4天赋加值，持续时间为每施法者等级一分钟。15级时，以此方式召唤的死灵生物以及不死生物伙伴额外获得数值为三倍你法师等级的临时生命值。

enGB: Profane Infusion
zhCN: 亵渎灌注

enGB: When the cruoromancer uses this infusion, the infused necromancy spell gains a +2 bonus to its caster level. You can use this ability only once per turn, as a free action.
zhCN: 当融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，被灌注的死灵法术施法者等级获得+2加值。此能力每回合只能使用一次，为自由动作。

enGB: At 20th level, a cruoromancer can use his blood infusions without spending hit points. In addition, the bonuses granted by his Focused Infusion and Profane Infusion increase to +4.
zhCN: 达到20级后，融血师施展融血灌注时不再消耗生命值。此外，其聚能灌注与亵渎灌注所提供的加值提升至+4。

enGB: As a standard action, you can channel positive energy, causing all undead within 30 feet to become panicked. Undead can attempt a Will saving throw to resist this effect, the DC of this save is equal to (10 + half your cleric level + your Charisma modifier). Undead that fail the save flee for 1 minute, and can attempt a new saving throw each round to end the effect. Additionally, deal (1d4 + half your wizard level + your Intelligence modifier) damage to all hostile undead creatures within the area. When channel energy is used in this way, it produces no other effect (such as healing or harming nearby creatures).
zhCN: 以一个标准动作，你可以引导正向能量，使30尺内的所有不死生物陷入惊恐状态并四处逃窜。不死生物可以进行意志豁免来抵抗该效果，豁免难度等级为10+1/2你的牧师等级+你的魅力调整值。豁免失败的不死生物将逃窜1分钟，并且每轮都可以进行一次新的豁免以提前结束该效果。此外，此次引导能量还会对区域内所有敌对的死灵生物造成1d4+1/2你的法师等级+你的智力调整值的伤害。若以此方式使用引导能量，它将不会产生任何治疗或其他效果。

enGB: Undead Touch
zhCN: 不死之触

enGB: As a standard action, you can touch an undead creature and infuse it with negative energy. This grants the target a +1 profane bonus on attack rolls and saving throws, plus 1 temporary hit point per caster level. The bonus on attacks and saves increases by 1 for every 5 wizard levels you possess. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to half your wizard level (minimum 1 round). You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier.
zhCN: 以一个标准动作，你可以碰触一个不死生物并替它注入负能量。使其攻击跟豁免检定的+1亵渎加值，以及每施法者等级1点的临时生命值。在攻击和豁免的加值会在你每5个法师等级增加1点。这些加值持续法师等级一半的轮数（至少1轮）。你每天可以使用这个能力的次数为3+智力调整值。

enGB: Dead Sight
zhCN: 亡者视野

enGB: You emit a 30-foot-radius aura. You and all undead within the aura gain a +1 profane bonus on ability checks, attack rolls, saving throws, and damage rolls. Hostile living creatures within the aura take a –1 penalty on ability checks, attack rolls, saving throws, and damage rolls. Additionally, you gain blindsight.
zhCN: 你发出一道30英尺范围的灵光。你自身与灵光范围内的所有不死生物在属性检定、攻击检定、豁免检定和伤害检定上获得+1亵渎加值；范围内的敌对活物在属性检定、攻击检定、豁免检定和伤害检定上受到-1减值。此外，你自身获得盲视。

enGB:
When a cruoromancer casts a Spell of the necromancy school, he can opt to infuse that spell with his undead-tainted blood as a swift action. As he increases in level, the power and effects of such infusions become more potent. Each time a cruoromancer uses blood infusion, he drains a portion of his own blood either by cutting himself with a blade or by opening a scab from a previous wound. When he does this, he takes an amount of damage equal to 1d4 + half his wizard level.
At 1st level, they can infuse their necromancy spells in either of the following ways:
Focused Infusion: When the cruoromancer uses this infusion, they adds +1 to the DC of the infused necromancy spell. This ability can be used only once per round. At 5th level, the bonus increases to +2. At 8th level, this infusion becomes a free action.
Sickening Infusion: When the cruoromancer channels blood power in this way, a creature that takes damage from the infused necromancy spell becomes sickened for 1 + half your wizard level rounds. You can use this ability only once per turn. At 8th level, this infusion becomes a free action.
zhCN:
融血师在施放死灵学派的法术时，可以选择花费迅捷动作，将自己被死灵能量污染的血液之力灌注入该法术当中。随着等级提升，这些灌注效果和威力都会变得更强。每次施展融血灌注时，融血师要用刀割伤自己，或者揭开旧伤口的结痂，从而流失自身的一部分血液。这么做会让他受到1d4+法师等级一半的伤害。
1级起，他可以用以下任一形式灌注死灵法术：
聚能灌注：融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，被灌注的死灵法术难度等级+1。此能力每回合只能使用一次。5级时，加值提升至+2；8级时，此灌注改为一个自由动作。
恶心灌注：融血师以此形式灌注血液之力时，受到被灌注的死灵法术伤害的生物陷入恶心状态，持续1 + 你的法师等级的一半的轮数。此能力每回合只能使用一次。8级时，此灌注改为一个自由动作。

enGB:
The dread and feared necromancer commands undead and uses the foul power of unlife against his enemies.
Power over undead: You receive Turn Undead as a bonus feat. You can channel energy a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier, but only to use this feat. The DC to save against these feats is equal to 10 + half your Wizard level + your Charisma modifier. At 20th level, undead cannot add their channel resistance to the save against this ability.
Undead Touch: As a standard action, you can touch an undead creature and infuse it with negative energy. This grants the target a +1 profane bonus on attack rolls and saving throws, plus 1 temporary hit point per caster level. The bonus on attacks and saves increases by 1 for every 5 wizard levels you possess. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to half your wizard level (minimum 1 round). You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier.
Dead Sight: You emit a 30-foot-radius aura. You and all undead within the aura gain a +1 profane bonus on ability checks, attack rolls, saving throws, and damage rolls. Hostile living creatures within the aura take a –1 penalty on ability checks, attack rolls, saving throws, and damage rolls. Additionally, you gain blindsight.
zhCN:
狰狞骇人的死灵师可命令不死生物，并使用禁忌的不死生命力量来对抗敌人。
驾驭亡者：你获得驱散死灵作为额外专长。你每天可引导能量的次数为智力调整值+3，但这些次数仅可被用于该专长。该专长的豁免检定难度等级为10+1/2法师等级+魅力调整值。达到20级后，不死生物将无法在针对此能力进行豁免检定时附加它们的引导抗性加值。
不死之触：以一个标准动作，你可以碰触一个不死生物并替它注入负能量。使其攻击跟豁免检定的+1亵渎加值，以及每施法者等级1点的临时生命值。在攻击和豁免的加值会在你每5个法师等级增加1点。这些加值持续法师等级一半的轮数（至少1轮）。你每天可以使用这个能力的次数为3+智力调整值。
亡者视野：你发出一道30英尺范围的灵光。你自身与灵光范围内的所有不死生物在属性检定、攻击检定、豁免检定和伤害检定上获得+1亵渎加值；范围内的敌对活物在属性检定、攻击检定、豁免检定和伤害检定上受到-1减值。此外，你自身获得盲视。

enGB: Blood Line Undead
zhCN: 亡灵血承

enGB:
Your family atmosphere is filled with a foul smell of a cemetery. Perhaps your ancestors were powerful necromancers or vampires, or maybe you were a deceased person who was suddenly brought back to life. Anyway, the power of death flows through you, influencing every action you make. You can summon the evil power of the dead. Unfortunately, each time you use this power, you get closer to joining them.
Necromancer Bloodline Extra Talent: Combat Casting, Hardened Stone, Iron Will, Skill Focus (Knowledge: Religion), Spell Focus, High Spell Focus, Robust, Tenacious.
zhCN:
你的家族弥漫着一股墓地的腐败气息。或许你的先祖曾是一名实力强劲的巫妖或吸血鬼，也可能是你自出生便是死者，只是突然被复活了而已。无论如何，死亡之力在你的身上流淌，影响着你的每个动作。你可以呼唤死者的邪恶力量。不幸的是，你每使用一次这种力量，就会离加入它们更近一步。
亡灵血承额外专长：战斗施法、顽石强韧、钢铁意志、技能专攻（学识：宗教）、法术专攻、高等法术专攻、健壮、顽强。

enGB: Blood Line Undead Arcana
zhCN: 亡灵血承奥法

enGB: The additional special skills bestowed by the Bloodline Undead
zhCN: 亡灵血承赋予的额外本职技能

enGB: Ray Of Enfeeblement
zhCN: 衰弱射线

enGB:
When reaching level 3, and every 2 levels thereafter, the Warlock can learn an additional spell from Bloodline. This spell is not counted towards the number of spells granted by the new level.
Weakness Ray: A dazzling ray shoots out from your hand. You need to successfully make a ranged touch attack check to hit the target. The target will suffer 1d6 + 1 point of strength penalty per 2 levels of the caster (up to a maximum of 1d6 + 5 points). The target's strength will not be reduced below 1 point. A successful Fortitude saving throw halves the penalty. Multiple penalties do not stack; only the highest penalty is taken.
zhCN:
达到3级时，以及之后每升2级，术士都可以额外学习一个来自于血承的法术。该法术不计入新等级赋予的法术数量。
衰弱射线：一道耀眼的射线从你的手中射出。你需要成功进行远程接触攻击检定，才能够击中目标。目标会受到1d6+每两个施法者等级1点力量减值（最高1d6+5点）。目标的力量不会被降到1点以下。强韧豁免成功可使减值减半。多个减值不会叠加，只取其中最高的减值。

enGB: Immunity Precision Damage
zhCN: 无漏之躯

enGB: Your body has transcended the limitations of the physical world. There are no conventional vulnerabilities. You are immune to precise damage, such as sneak attacks.
zhCN: 你的身躯已经超脱了肉体凡胎的限制，不存在常规意义上的要害，你可以免疫精准伤害，例如偷袭。

enGB: Dhampir Resonance
zhCN: 吸血鬼共鸣

enGB: Your veins are infused with the power of the undead. When using spells from the Necromancy School, the caster's level increases by a fourth of the character's level.
zhCN: 吸血裔能与死亡的力量共鸣，使用死灵学派法术时施法者等级提升1/4角色等级。

enGB: Resonate with the power of death through your blood, and your caster level for the Necromancy school will increase based on your character level.
zhCN: 通过你的血脉与死亡的力量共鸣，根据角色等级提升用于死灵学派的施法者等级

enGB:
Gebian Necromancer adds Lore (Religion) to their list of class skills. Gebian Necromancer gains a +1 bonus on attack rolls, AC, and initiative checks, and gains a +1 bonus on damage rolls made with necromancy spells.
If the character already has the class skill, weapon proficiency or armor proficiency granted by the selected background from her class during character creation, then the corresponding bonuses from background change to a +1 competence bonus in case of skills, a +1 enhancement bonus in case of weapon proficiency and a -1 Armor Check Penalty reduction in case of armor proficiency.
zhCN:
盖布死灵师将学识（宗教）加入本职技能列表。其召唤的不死生物和死灵生物伙伴的攻击检定、AC和先攻获得+1加值，并且自身在使用死灵法术造成的伤害上获得+1加值。
如果角色已在角色创建过程中，通过职业获取了上述本职技能，武器擅长或防具擅长，则背景提供的相应加值改为相关技能上的+1表现加值，相关武器上的+1增强加值，相关防具上的防具检定减值–1。

enGB: The balance between life and death has been shattered within you. The frigid breath of death has completely overwhelmed your vitality, and you have been fully transformed into an undead creature.
zhCN: 生死之间的平衡在你身上被打破了，冰冷的死气完全压倒你的生机，你彻底转变成一名不死生物。

enGB: Upon reaching Level 20, your body is permeated by the power of death, and you no longer possess vital organs in the conventional sense. You gain immunity to cold, paralysis, sleep, and precision damage. You also acquire damage reduction 5/—. Additionally, you get a +4 morale bonus on saving throws against spells and spell-like abilities cast by undead creatures.
zhCN: 达到20级后，你的躯体被死亡的力量浸润了，再也没有常规意义上的要害，你对寒冷、麻痹、睡眠和精准伤害免疫。同时获得伤害减免5/—。你在对抗不死生物施展的法术和类法术能力时，豁免检定获得+4士气加值。

enGB: Limited to three uses per day, you can drain blood from a living creature or from the corpse of a living being. When you do so, you gain 5 temporary hit points, plus an additional 5 temporary hit points for every three Hit Dice you possess. You also gain a +1 bonus on Fortitude saving throws. All these effects last for 1 hour.
zhCN: 每日限三次，你可以从一个活物身上吸血，或者从活物的尸体上吸血。若如此做，你获得5点临时生命值，你每拥有三个生命骰，额外获得5点临时生命值。你还会在强韧豁免检定上获得+1加值。以上效果持续1小时。

enGB:
When reaching level 7, and every 6 levels thereafter, the sorcerer gains 1 additional feat, which is selected from the feat list corresponding to each bloodline. The character must meet the prerequisites of the additional feat.
Additional Feats for Undead Bloodline: Combat Casting, Diehard, Iron Will, Skill Focus (Knowledge: Religion), Spell Focus, Greater Spell Focus, Toughness, Tenacious, Metamagic (Maximize Spell).
zhCN:
达到7级时，以及之后每升6级，术士都会获得1个额外专长，从各血承对应的专长列表中选择。角色必须满足额外专长的先决条件。
亡灵血承额外专长：战斗施法、顽石强韧、钢铁意志、技能专攻（学识：宗教）、法术专攻、高等法术专攻、健壮，顽强，超魔（法术极效）。

enGB: The affected creature becomes frightened. If the subject succeeds at a Will save, it is shaken for 1d4 rounds. Creatures with 6 or more HD are immune to this effect. Cause fear dispels remove fear.
zhCN: 受到法术影响的生物会陷入惊恐状态。如果目标意志豁免成功，则陷入战栗状态 1D4轮。生命骰数不低于 6 的生物免疫该效果。惊恐术能够解除移除恐惧。

enGB: The subject is immediately sickened for the spell’s duration. A successful Fortitude save negates this effect. If the target is already sickened and fails the Fortitude save again, it becomes nauseated instead.
zhCN: 在法术持续时间内，目标陷入恶心状态。若目标通过强韧豁免，则免除此效果。若目标已经处于恶心状态且再次强韧豁免失败，则改为陷入反胃状态。

enGB: All living targets with fewer than 6 HD become frightened. If the target succeeds at a Will save, it is shaken for 1d4 rounds instead. Creatures with 6 or more HD are immune to this effect. Scare dispels remove fear.
zhCN: 所有生命骰数小于6的活物目标都将陷入惊恐状态。若生物进行意志豁免成功，则只陷入战栗状态1D4轮。生命骰数大于或等于6的生物对此效果免疫。恐吓术能够解除移除恐惧。

enGB: You take control of a target creature’s skeleton, causing it to rattle violently within its flesh and deal grievous harm. The target takes 3d6 points of damage, plus 1d6 additional points of damage per 2 caster levels. This spell also affects undead creatures, but it has no effect on incorporeal creatures such as ghosts.
zhCN: 你控制一个目标生物体内的骨架。骨架在该生物血肉里剧烈颤抖，给生物带来重创。目标将受到3d6点伤害，此外再加上每两个施法者等级1d6点额外伤害。该法术对不死生物同样生效，但对幽灵等虚体生物无效。

enGB: The bones of the target’s joints grow thick and sharp, painfully protruding through the skin at the knuckles, elbows, shoulders, spine, and knees. The target gains a +1 bonus to natural armor and a +2 bonus on damage rolls with natural weapons, and deals an additional 1d6 points of piercing damage on successful grapple checks. If the target is undead, it gains an additional +2 bonus to natural armor and receives 1d6 temporary hit points plus 1 temporary hit point per 2 caster levels.
zhCN: 目标关节处的骨头变得又粗又尖，在一阵疼痛中穿出指节、肘部、肩部、脊柱和膝盖处的皮肤。每个目标的天生防御获得+1加值，以天生武器进行的伤害检定获得+2加值，并且在成功进行擒抱检定时还会造成额外的1d6点穿刺伤害。若目标为不死生物，则其天生防御额外获得+2加值，并获得1d6点加上每2个施法者等级1点的临时生命值。

enGB: You weaken the target’s defenses against poison. The target takes a -4 penalty on saving throws against poison, and attempts to cure the poisoned target also take a -4 penalty. If the target fails its saving throw, it takes 1D3 points of Constitution damage, and for the duration of the spell it suffers an additional -2 penalty on Fortitude saving throws.
zhCN: 你弱化目标对毒素的防御能力。目标在对抗毒素进行豁免检定时受到-4减值，尝试治疗目标身上的毒素时，相关检定同样受到-4减值。若目标豁免失败，则会受到1D3点体质伤害，并且在法术持续时间内，目标在进行强韧豁免时还将额外承受-2减值。

enGB: Imbuing you with negative energy, this spell allows you to paralyze a single living humanoid for the duration of the spell with a successful melee touch attack. A paralyzed subject exudes a carrion stench that causes all living creatures within a 10-foot radius (except you) to become sickened (Fortitude negates). A neutralize poison spell removes this effect from a sickened creature, and creatures immune to poison are unaffected by the stench; this is a poison effect. If the living target is slain while ghoul touch remains in effect, its corpse rises as a ghoul under your control for 1 round per caster level.
zhCN: 此法术为你灌注负向能量，使你能够在法术持续时间内通过成功的近战接触攻击麻痹一个类人活物。被麻痹的目标会散发出腐肉的恶臭，导致10英尺半径范围内的所有活物（除你以外）陷入恶心状态（强韧豁免免除效果）。法术中和毒素可以为陷入恶心状态的生物移除该效果，免疫毒素的生物则不受恶臭影响，此效果属于毒素效应。若目标活物在食尸鬼之触的持续时间内被杀死，则其尸体会复活为一具食尸鬼为你战斗，持续时间为每施法者等级1轮。

enGB: The creature becomes paralyzed and exudes a carrion stench that causes all living creatures within a 10-foot radius (except the caster of this spell) to become sickened (Fortitude negates). A neutralize poison spell removes this effect from a sickened creature, and creatures immune to poison are unaffected by the stench; this is a poison effect. If the living target is slain while ghoul touch remains in effect, its corpse rises as a ghoul under your control for 1 round per caster level.
zhCN: 该生物陷入麻痹状态，并散发出腐肉的恶臭，导致10英尺扩散半径内所有活物（此法术的施法者除外）陷入恶心状态（强韧免除效果）。法术中和毒素可移除陷入恶心的生物身上的此效果，免疫毒素的生物不受恶臭影响，此为毒素效应。若目标活物在食尸鬼之触的持续时间内被杀死，则其尸体会复活为一具食尸鬼为你战斗，持续时间为每施法者等级1轮。

enGB: You inflict a painful, itching rash on the target creature. The target becomes sickened and, on a failed saving throw, takes a Dexterity penalty equal to 4 plus 1 for every 2 caster levels (this penalty cannot reduce Dexterity below 0); on a successful saving throw, the target takes only half this penalty.
zhCN: 你使目标生物身上出现奇痒难耐的皮疹。目标陷入恶心状态，并在豁免失败时其敏捷属性承受4点加上每2个施法者等级1点的减值（该减值无法将敏捷属性降至0点以下）；若豁免成功，则仅承受上述减值的一半。

enGB:
You place a curse on the target. Choose one of the following curses: Curse of Feeble Body — the target takes a -6 penalty to Constitution;
Curse of Weakness — the target takes a -6 penalty to Strength and Dexterity;
Curse of Idiocy — the target takes a -6 penalty to Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma;
Curse of Deterioration — the target takes a -4 penalty on attack rolls, saves, ability checks, and skill checks;
Curse of Terror — each round the target has only a 50% chance to act normally, otherwise it remains in place under a fear effect.
zhCN:
你对目标施以诅咒，从下列诅咒中选择一项：弱体诅咒——受术目标的体质值受到-6减值；
无能诅咒——受术目标的力量与敏捷值受到-6减值；
愚痴诅咒——受术目标的智力、感知与魅力值受到-6减值；
衰颓诅咒——受术目标在攻击检定、豁免检定、属性检定与技能检定时受到-4减值；
恐怖诅咒——每回合目标只有50%概率可以正常行动，否则将在原地承受恐惧效果。

enGB: Curse of Terror
zhCN: 恐怖诅咒

enGB: Each round the target has only a 50% chance to act normally, otherwise it remains in place under a fear effect.
zhCN: 目标每回合目标只有50%概率可以正常行动，否则将在原地承受恐惧效果。

enGB:
The subject contracts one of the following diseases: blinding sickness, bubonic plague, cackle fever, mindfire, or shakes. The disease takes effect immediately (the onset period does not apply). If the target fails its saving throw, it must attempt a Fortitude save at the start of each subsequent round to resist the disease’s worsening; on a failure, it takes the corresponding ability damage again each round, and this worsening lasts for 1 round per caster level.
Blinding Sickness effect: 1d4 Strength damage, and the target must make an additional Fortitude save or become permanently blinded;
Bubonic Plague effect: 1d4 Constitution damage and the target becomes fatigued;
Cackle Fever effect: 1d6 Wisdom damage;
Mindfire effect: 1d4 Intelligence damage;
Shakes effect: 1d8 Dexterity damage.
zhCN:
目标感染以下疾病之一：目盲症、黑死病、失心疯、脑热症或寒颤症。疾病立刻生效（无潜伏期）。若目标豁免失败，则在之后每个回合开始时必须再次进行一次强韧豁免以抵御疫病恶化，否则每轮都会再次承受一次相应的属性伤害，该恶化效果持续每施法者等级1轮。
目盲症效果：1d4点力量伤害，目标必须进行额外的强韧豁免，若失败则永久目盲；
黑死病效果：1d4点体质伤害并陷入疲劳状态；
失心疯效果：1d6点感知伤害；
脑热症效果：1d4点智力伤害；
寒颤症效果：1d8点敏捷伤害。

enGB: The target’s bones (or exoskeleton) splinter, dealing 1d6 damage per caster level (maximum 15d6), but if the target is undead the damage becomes 1d8 per caster level (maximum 15d8); the target is also exhausted for 1 minute per caster level from the pain and exertion of the transformation. On a successful Fortitude save, the damage is halved and the target is fatigued instead of exhausted.
zhCN: 目标的骨骼（或外骨骼）碎裂飞散，造成每施法者等级1d6点伤害（最高15d6点），若目标为不死生物则伤害改为每施法者等级1d8（最高15d8点），同时使目标因痛苦和疲累陷入力竭状态，持续每施法者等级1分钟。若目标强韧豁免成功，则伤害减半，并陷入疲劳而非力竭状态。

enGB: Calling upon the venomous powers of natural predators, you infect the subject with a terrible poison by making a successful melee touch attack. This poison deals 1d4 Constitution damage per round for 6 rounds. Poisoned creatures may attempt a Fortitude save each round to negate the damage and end the affliction.
zhCN: 你唤起大自然中捕食者的毒性，成功进行近战接触攻击检定后便可使目标身中剧毒。该毒素每轮造成1d4点体质伤害，持续6轮。中毒的生物每轮可尝试强韧豁免检定来免受伤害并结束该负向效果。

enGB:
Injury; Save: Fortitude
Frequency: 1/ round for 6 rounds
Effect: 1d4 Constitution damage
Cure: 1 successful save
zhCN:
受创；豁免：强韧
频率：1次/轮，持续6轮
效果：1d4点体质伤害
痊愈：1次豁免成功

enGB: Invoke Death
zhCN: 唤起死亡

enGB: As a standard action, you summon a fierce skeletal champion to serve you. This undead creature gains a bonus to its Strength and Charisma equal to your Charisma modifier.The duration is 1 minute per Charisma modifier.At 7th level, you can additionally summon one bloody bones beast.At 15th level, you can additionally summon one soul-eater.
zhCN: 以一个标准动作，唤起一个凶猛骷髅战将来服侍你，这个不死生物的力量和魅力获得你的魅力调整值的加值。持续时间等于1分钟/魅力调整值，7级时可以额外唤起一个血腥骨兽，15级时可以额外唤起一个吞魂鬼。

enGB: Blood Bath
zhCN: 血流成河

enGB: Whenever you deal negative energy damage with a spell or ability, the target begins to bleed, taking 1d6 damage each round. This damage increases by an additional 1d6 at 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter. Your necromancy spells benefit from increased range, as if modified by the Distant Spell metamagic feat.
zhCN: 当你造成负能量伤害的法术或能力时，将会使敌人开始流血，每轮受到1D6点伤害，5级以及之后每5级，该伤害再增加1D6。你的死灵法术能增加远距离施法，如同运用了超魔：法术及远。

enGB: Endless Murderous Intent
zhCN: 无尽杀意

enGB: Once per round, you may use Cure Critical Wounds or Inflict Critical Wounds as a free action.
zhCN: 每轮1次，你能以自由动作使用重伤术或者杀生术

enGB: Starting at 2nd level, a Dirge Singer gains a bonus to Knowledge (religion) checks equal to half her bard level. A Dirge Singer can use mind-affecting spells to affect undead as if they were living creatures. For the purpose of determining which spells can affect undead, treat them as humanoids. Additionally, add the following necromancy spells to her list of known spells:2nd level: Ray of Enfeeblement, Cause Fear.6th level: Scare, Command Undead.8th level: Lesser Control Undead, Ray of Exhaustion.10th level: Control Undead, Fear.14th level: Ray of Agony, Wave of Fatigue.17th level: Purge Undead, Sonic Wail
zhCN: 2级起，哀歌咏者在学识（宗教）检定上获得等于吟游诗人等级一半的加值。哀歌咏者可以用影响心智的法术影响不死生物，如同它们是活物一般。在判定哪些法术可以影响不死生物时，将它们视为类人生物。此外，将以下死灵法术加入已知法术列表：2级时，衰弱射线，惊恐术。6级时，恐吓术，号令死灵。8级时，次等操纵亡者，力竭射线。10级时，操纵亡者，恐惧术。14级时，剧痛射线，疲乏波。17级时，净化亡者，音爆哀鸣

enGB: Animate Dead Reinforcement
zhCN: 亡者增援

enGB: Summon Zombie
zhCN: 召唤僵尸战士

enGB: Once per day, summon a CR 3 zombie warrior to fight for you. It lasts 10 minutes per level of Necromancer.
zhCN: 每天1次，召唤一个CR3的僵尸战士为你作战，持续每活尸学家等级10分钟

enGB: Summon Ghoul Hunt Master
zhCN: 召唤食尸鬼狩猎大师

enGB: Once per day, summon a CR 7 Ghoul Hunt Master to fight for you. It lasts 10 minutes per level of Necromancer.
zhCN: 每天1次，召唤一个CR7的食尸鬼狩猎大师为你作战，持续每活尸学家等级10分钟

enGB: Summon Bloody Bones Servant
zhCN: 召唤血腥骨兽

enGB: Once per day, summon a Bloody Bones Servant to fight for you. It lasts 10 minutes per level of Necromancer.
zhCN: 每天1次，召唤一个血腥骨兽为你作战，持续每活尸学家等级10分钟

enGB: Fatal Embrace
zhCN: 致命拥抱

enGB: Your embrace is lethal enough; with a single touch, you can temporarily transform a target into an undead creature.
zhCN: 你的拥抱足以致命，你可以用一个接触动作将目标短暂地转化为不死生物。

enGB: Additional Spell(FalseLifeGreater)
zhCN: 额外法术（高等虚假生命）

enGB: Additional Specialties: Resilience, Evade, Tenacity, Agile Movement, Powerful Attack, Weapon Specialization, Weapon Proficiency, Heavy Strike Mastery.
zhCN: 额外专长：顽强、闪避、坚韧、灵活移动、猛力攻击、武器专攻、武器专精、重击精通。

enGB: Target's bones explode in the body. If the target fails a Fortitude saving throw, it receives 8 damage per caster level and becomes exhausted, and all creatures in a 30 feet radius receive 1d8 damage per caster level (Reflex save halves). If the Fortitude saving throw is successful, the target receives 1d8 damage per caster level and becomes fatigued, and all creatures in a 30 feet radius receive 1d6 damage per caster level instead (Reflex save halves).
zhCN: 目标的骨骼在身体中爆裂。若目标在强韧豁免检定中失败，将受到每施法者等级8点伤害并陷入力竭状态，30英尺半径范围内的所有生物受到每施法者等级1d8点伤害（反射豁免检定成功可减半该伤害）。如果强韧豁免检定成功，目标受到每施法者等级1d8点伤害并陷入疲劳状态，30英尺半径范围内的所有生物改为受到每施法者等级1d6点伤害（反射豁免检定成功可减半该伤害）。

enGB: This spell works as vampiric touch, except it's a ranged touch attack in medium range and the amount of damage is 1d8 per caster level. The target also becomes fatigued.
zhCN: 此法术效果类似于吸血鬼之触，区别在于它是一个中距的远程接触攻击，伤害值改为每施法者等级1d8点，并且使目标陷入疲劳状态。

enGB: Circle of death snuffs out the life force of living creatures. The spell affects 1d6 HD worth of living creatures per caster level (maximum 20d6). Those who are closest to the burst's point of origin are affected first. Creatures with Hit Dice equal to or less than 9 + 1 per caster level (maximum +10) that fail their saving throw are slain outright, while creatures with more Hit Dice than that which fail their saving throw take 100 damage instead. HD that are not sufficient to affect a creature are wasted.
zhCN: 死亡法阵会消灭活物的生命力。此法术可影响总生命骰数不超过每施法者等级1d6（最高20d6）的活物。越接近法术爆发源头的活物越先受影响。生命骰数小于等于9+每施法者等级1点（最高+10）的生物若豁免失败，将被立即杀死；生命骰数高于该数值的生物若豁免失败，则改为受到100点伤害。不足以影响一个生物的多余生命骰数忽略不计。
不死归亡

enGB: Undeath to Death destroys undead creatures. The spell affects 1d6 HD worth of undead creatures per caster level (maximum 20d6). Those with the fewest Hit Dice are affected first, and among creatures with equal Hit Dice, those closest to the burst's point of origin are affected first. Undead creatures with Hit Dice equal to or less than 9 + 1 per caster level (maximum +10) that fail their saving throw are slain outright, while undead creatures with more Hit Dice than that which fail their saving throw take 100 damage instead. HD that are not sufficient to affect a creature are wasted.
zhCN: 该法术能够熄灭不死生物的生命之火，将其立刻击杀。此法术可影响总生命骰数不超过每施法者等级1d6（最高20d6）的不死生物。生命骰数越低的生物越先受影响，而在相同生命骰数的生物中，最接近法术爆发源点的生物先受影响。生命骰数小于等于9+每施法者等级1点（最高+10）的亡灵生物若豁免失败，将被立即杀死；生命骰数高于该数值的亡灵生物若豁免失败，则改为受到100点伤害。不足以影响一个生物的多余生命骰数忽略不计。

enGB: Heal enables you to channel positive energy into a creature to wipe away injury and afflictions. It immediately ends any and all of the following adverse conditions affecting the target: ability damage, blinded, confused, dazed, dazzled, diseased, exhausted, fatigued, nauseated, poisoned, sickened, and stunned. It also cures 10 hit points of damage per caster level, to a maximum of 200 points at 20th level. Heal does not remove negative levels or restore permanently drained ability score points. If used against an undead creature, heal acts like harm.
zhCN: 医疗术可以让你向生物引导正向能量，驱除伤害和负向效果。它可立即结束以下所有影响目标的不利状态：属性伤害、目盲、困惑、眩晕、目眩、患病、力竭、疲劳、反胃、中毒、恶心及震慑。它还能治疗伤害，恢复每施法者等级10点生命值（20级时达到最多200点）。医疗术不会移除负向等级，也无法恢复永久的属性流失。如果对不死生物使用，医疗术改为产生类似重伤术的效果。

enGB: 1 minute/level
zhCN: 1分钟/级

enGB: Waves of negative energy render all living creatures in the spell's area fatigued. Creatures that are already fatigued become exhausted instead.
zhCN: 潮水般的负向能量使法术范围内的所有活物陷入疲劳状态。对于已经处于疲劳状态的生物，则改为使其陷入力竭状态。

enGB: You can make any undead creature fight on your side as if it was your ally. It will attack your opponents to the best of its ability.
zhCN: 你可以让不死生物为你作战，如同它是你的盟友。它会尽全力攻击你的敌人。

enGB: Starting from level 10, you can launch a melee contact attack against an enemy, inflicting excruciating pain upon it. If you hit successfully, you cause the target to suffer 1d4 temporary negative levels for 1 hour. Additionally, you can expend a swift action to activate this ability, enabling you to apply this effect to your next melee attack within the next minute. These temporary negative levels can be stacked. You will not receive any benefits from causing these negative levels (such as the temporary hit points gained by undead creatures due to the necromancy spell).
zhCN: 10级起，你可以对敌人发起一次近战接触攻击，使其承受难忍痛苦。若成功命中，你令目标承受1d4个临时负向等级，持续1小时。此外，你也能够花费迅捷动作来启动此能力，使你在接下来一分钟内，下一次近战攻击附带此效果。这些临时负向等级可叠加。你不会因造成这些负向等级而获得好处（比如不死生物因弱能术而获得的临时生命值。

enGB: You can use melee contact attacks to make a creature exhibit certain characteristics of an undead creature and be enhanced at the same time. When the touched creature is determining the effect of healing or causing damage based on positive or negative energy, it is regarded as an undead creature. Additionally, it gains the亵渎 bonus on attack rolls， skill checks， attribute checks， and saving throws， for a duration equal to half of the class level that grants you this domain (minimum 1 round). This ability can be cast once per day equal to 3 + the adjustment for perception.
zhCN: 你可以通过近战接触攻击，让一个生物显现出不死生物的某些特性，同时被增强。被触碰的生物在判定基于正向或负向能量的治疗或造成伤害效果时，视为不死生物，同时在攻击检定，技能检定，属性检定和豁免鉴定上获得亵渎加值，持续轮数等于赋予你此子域的职业等级的一半（最少1轮）。此能力每日可施展次数等于3+感知调整值。
